original_question: Em Curitiba/PR, para cada distrito, qual é a escola com maior razão “computadores de aluno por matrícula do ensino básico”, e qual é a distância até o CRAS mais próximo desse distrito?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Curitiba' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PR'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    CASE
      WHEN (COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_bas,0)) = 0 THEN 0.0
      ELSE (COALESCE(meb.qt_desktop_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_comp_portatil_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno,0)) / NULLIF(meb.qt_mat_bas,0)
    END AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola e
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
melhor_escola_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    er.cd_entidade,
    er.ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.cd_dist ORDER BY er.ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escolas_ratio er ON er.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(er.geometry, d.geom_dist)
),
cras_proximo AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    (SELECT ST_Distance(d.centroide, c.geometry)
     FROM cras c
     JOIN muni ON c.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
     ORDER BY d.centroide <-> c.geometry
     LIMIT 1) AS dist_cras_mais_proximo_m
  FROM distritos d
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  me.nm_entidade AS escola_top_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(mb.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS numeric), 4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(CAST(cp.dist_cras_mais_proximo_m AS numeric), 2) AS dist_cras_mais_proximo_m
FROM distritos d
JOIN melhor_escola_por_distrito mb ON mb.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND mb.rn = 1
JOIN escola me ON me.cd_entidade = mb.cd_entidade
JOIN cras_proximo cp ON cp.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Curitiba/RN, para cada distrito, qual é a escola que possui a maior razão de computadores (desktop e tablets) por matrícula no ensino fundamental (anos iniciais) e qual é a distância até o CRAS mais próximo desse distrito?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Curitiba' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RN'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    CASE
      WHEN (
        COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med_ct_ns, 0)
      ) = 0
      THEN 0.0
      ELSE (
        COALESCE(meb.qt_desktop_aluno, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno, 0)
      ) / NULLIF(meb.qt_mat_fund_ai, 0)
    END AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), melhor_escola_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    er.cd_entidade,
    er.ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.cd_dist ORDER BY er.ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escolas_ratio AS er
    ON er.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(er.geometry, d.geom_dist)
), cras_proximo AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    (
      SELECT
        ST_DISTANCE(d.centroide, c.geometry)
      FROM cras AS c
      JOIN muni
        ON c.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
      ORDER BY
        d.centroide <-> c.geometry
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS dist_cras_mais_proximo_m
  FROM distritos AS d
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  me.nm_entidade AS escola_top_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(mb.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS DECIMAL), 4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(CAST(cp.dist_cras_mais_proximo_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_cras_mais_proximo_m
FROM distritos AS d
JOIN melhor_escola_por_distrito AS mb
  ON mb.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND mb.rn = 1
JOIN escola AS me
  ON me.cd_entidade = mb.cd_entidade
JOIN cras_proximo AS cp
  ON cp.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

original_question: Em Salvador/BA, quais distritos apresentam maior diferença entre a quantidade de bibliotecas mapeadas e a quantidade de escolas com biblioteca, e qual a participação de cada distrito no total dessa diferença no município?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Salvador' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'BA'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
bib_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_bibliotecas
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(b.geometry, d.geometry)
    AND ST_Within(b.geometry, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
escolas_com_bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geometry)
    AND ST_Within(e.geometry, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0) = 1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
comparativo AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bibliotecas,0) AS qt_bibliotecas,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_bib,0) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM bib_por_distrito b
  FULL OUTER JOIN escolas_com_bib e ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
),
final AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bibliotecas,
    c.qt_escolas_bib,
    (c.qt_bibliotecas - c.qt_escolas_bib) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN comparativo c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bibliotecas,
  qt_escolas_bib,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca) OVER (),0) AS numeric)
  ,2) AS participacao_perc
FROM final
ORDER BY diferenca DESC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Salvador/PA, quais distritos apresentam a maior diferença entre a quantidade de bibliotecas mapeadas e a quantidade de escolas que possuem sala multiuso, e qual a participação de cada distrito em relação à diferença máxima observada no município?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Salvador' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PA'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), bib_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_bibliotecas
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN biblioteca AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(b.geometry, d.geometry)
    AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), escolas_com_bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geometry)
    AND ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_sala_multiuso, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), comparativo AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bibliotecas, 0) AS qt_bibliotecas,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_bib, 0) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM bib_por_distrito AS b
  FULL OUTER JOIN escolas_com_bib AS e
    ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
), final AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bibliotecas,
    c.qt_escolas_bib,
    (
      c.qt_bibliotecas - c.qt_escolas_bib
    ) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN comparativo AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bibliotecas,
  qt_escolas_bib,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(MAX(diferenca) OVER (), 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS participacao_perc
FROM final
ORDER BY
  diferenca DESC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Fortaleza/CE, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas com internet e banda larga entre as escolas contidas no distrito, e qual a distância média dessas escolas até o próprio distrito (borda mais próxima)?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Fortaleza' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'CE'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)) AS tot_contidas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
    ) AS tot_criterio,
    AVG(ST_Distance(es.geometry, d.geom_dist)) FILTER (WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)) AS dist_media_m
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escolas es ON es.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = es.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(es.geometry, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(b.tot_criterio,0) / NULLIF(b.tot_contidas,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga,
  ROUND(CAST(b.dist_media_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_m
FROM distritos d
JOIN base b ON b.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Fortaleza/ES, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas que possuem equipamento de som (qt_equip_som = 1) entre as escolas contidas no distrito, e qual a maior distância dessas escolas até a própria borda do distrito?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Fortaleza' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'ES'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), base AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)) AS tot_contidas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)
      AND COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_som, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_som, 0) = 1) AS tot_criterio,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(es.geometry, d.geom_dist)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, es.geometry)) AS dist_media_m
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escolas AS es
    ON es.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = es.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(es.geometry, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(b.tot_criterio, 0) / NULLIF(b.tot_contidas, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga,
  ROUND(CAST(b.dist_media_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_m
FROM distritos AS d
JOIN base AS b
  ON b.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Manaus/AM, para cada distrito, qual a escola, entre as contidas no distrito, com maior total de matrículas no fundamental + médio e que também esteja a até 1.000 m de alguma biblioteca contida no mesmo distrito? Traga a distância até a biblioteca mais próxima.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Manaus' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AM'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_matriculas AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry,
    COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med,0) AS tot_mat
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.tot_mat,
    (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry))
     FROM biblioteca b
     WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
       AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
       AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, b.geometry, 1000)
    ) AS dist_bib_mais_proxima_m
  FROM distritos d
  INNER JOIN escolas_matriculas e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist, cd_entidade, tot_mat, dist_bib_mais_proxima_m,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY tot_mat DESC NULLS LAST, dist_bib_mais_proxima_m ASC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
  WHERE dist_bib_mais_proxima_m IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  r.tot_mat,
  ROUND(CAST(r.dist_bib_mais_proxima_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m
FROM distritos d
INNER JOIN ranked r ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
INNER JOIN escola es ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY tot_mat DESC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Manaus/ES, para cada distrito, qual a escola, entre as que estão contidas no distrito, possui o maior total de matrículas (soma das matrículas no 5º ano do Ensino Fundamental e no Ensino Médio propedêutico) e que ainda esteja a no máximo 1 328 metros de alguma biblioteca localizada no mesmo distrito? Apresente a soma das distâncias entre a escola e todas as bibliotecas que atendam ao critério de proximidade.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Manaus' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'ES'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas_matriculas AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund_ai_5, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med_prop, 0) AS tot_mat
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.tot_mat,
    (
      SELECT
        SUM(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, b.geometry))
      FROM biblioteca AS b
      WHERE
        b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
        AND ST_DWITHIN(e.geometry, b.geometry, 1328)
    ) AS dist_bib_mais_proxima_m
  FROM distritos AS d
  INNER JOIN escolas_matriculas AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    cd_entidade,
    tot_mat,
    dist_bib_mais_proxima_m,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY cd_dist
      ORDER BY tot_mat DESC NULLS LAST, dist_bib_mais_proxima_m ASC
    ) AS rn
  FROM cand
  WHERE
    NOT dist_bib_mais_proxima_m IS NULL
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  r.tot_mat,
  ROUND(CAST(r.dist_bib_mais_proxima_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m
FROM distritos AS d
INNER JOIN ranked AS r
  ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
INNER JOIN escola AS es
  ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY
  tot_mat DESC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Goiânia/GO, qual é, por distrito, a proporção de escolas contidas no distrito que funcionam no período noturno e possuem rampas de acessibilidade? Liste do maior para o menor percentual.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Goiânia' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'GO'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS tot_contidas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_rampas,0)=1
    ) AS tot_noturno_rampa
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_noturno_rampa,0) / NULLIF(a.tot_contidas,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_noturno_com_rampa
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_noturno_com_rampa DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Goiânia/RS, qual é, por distrito, a proporção de escolas contidas no distrito que oferecem EJA e possuem sinalização de acessibilidade? Liste do maior para o menor percentual.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Goiânia' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RS'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS tot_contidas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_eja, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_sinalizacao, 0) = 1) AS tot_noturno_rampa
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_noturno_rampa, 0) / NULLIF(a.tot_contidas, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_noturno_com_rampa
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_noturno_com_rampa DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

original_question: Em Belém/PA, por distrito, quantas escolas contidas no distrito possuem laboratório de informática e ficam a até 500 m de um CRAS também contido no mesmo distrito?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Belém' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PA'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
marcados AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, c.geometry, 500)
        )
    ) AS qt_escolas_criterio
  FROM distritos d
  RIGHT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(m.qt_escolas_criterio,0) AS qt_escolas
FROM distritos d
LEFT JOIN marcados m ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY qt_escolas DESC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Belém/MG, por distrito, quantas escolas contidas no distrito possuem quadra de esportes coberta e ficam a até 1 707 m de um CRAS também contido no mesmo distrito?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Belém' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), marcados AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_quadra_esportes_coberta, 0) = 1
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(e.geometry, c.geometry, 1707)
      )) AS qt_escolas_criterio
  FROM distritos AS d
  RIGHT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(m.qt_escolas_criterio, 0) AS qt_escolas
FROM distritos AS d
LEFT JOIN marcados AS m
  ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  qt_escolas DESC,
  distrito

original_question: No Rio de Janeiro/RJ, por distrito, qual a diferença entre a quantidade de bibliotecas contidas no distrito e a quantidade de escolas contidas no distrito que possuem biblioteca? Traga também a participação percentual de cada distrito no total dessa diferença no município.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Rio de Janeiro' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RJ'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
bib AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
esc_bib AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib,0) AS qt_bibliotecas,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_bib,0) AS qt_escolas_biblioteca
  FROM bib b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_bib e ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
),
fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bibliotecas,
    c.qt_escolas_biblioteca,
    (c.qt_bibliotecas - c.qt_escolas_biblioteca) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN cmp c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bibliotecas,
  qt_escolas_biblioteca,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca) OVER (),0) AS numeric),2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY diferenca DESC, distrito;

changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Rio de Janeiro' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RN'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN biblioteca AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), esc_bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_bib
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry) AND COALESCE(meb.in_banheiro, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib, 0) AS qt_bibliotecas,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_bib, 0) AS qt_escolas_biblioteca
  FROM bib AS b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_bib AS e
    ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
), fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bibliotecas,
    c.qt_escolas_biblioteca,
    (
      c.qt_bibliotecas - c.qt_escolas_biblioteca
    ) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN cmp AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bibliotecas,
  qt_escolas_biblioteca,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(MAX(diferenca) OVER (), 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY
  diferenca DESC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Florianópolis/SC, qual é, por distrito, a distância média das escolas com internet e banda larga até o centróide do próprio distrito, considerando apenas escolas contidas no município e no respectivo distrito? Ordene do menor para o maior.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Florianópolis' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'SC'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
    ) AS dist_media_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_m,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY a.dist_media_m ASC NULLS LAST) AS ranking_menor_dist
FROM dist d
JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY ranking_menor_dist, distrito;
changed_question: Em Florianópolis/PR, qual é, por distrito, a maior distância entre as escolas que possuem computador portátil para aluno e acesso à internet para aprendizagem e o centróide do próprio distrito, considerando apenas as escolas localizadas dentro do município e dentro do respectivo distrito? Ordene do menor para o maior.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Florianópolis' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PR'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS dist_media_m
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_comp_portatil_aluno, 0) = 1
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet_aprendizagem, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_m,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY a.dist_media_m ASC) AS ranking_menor_dist
FROM dist AS d
JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  ranking_menor_dist,
  distrito

original_question: Em Teresina/PI, para cada distrito, qual a menor distância entre as escolas com biblioteca e o CRAS mais próximo contido no mesmo distrito? Mostre também o total de escolas que atingem essa menor distância por distrito.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Teresina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PI'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
min_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    MIN(
      (SELECT ST_Distance(e.geometry, c.geometry)
       FROM cras c
       WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
       ORDER BY e.geometry <-> c.geometry
       LIMIT 1)
    ) AS menor_dist_m
  FROM dist d
  INNER JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
contagem_no_min AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_no_min
  FROM dist d
  INNER JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0)=1
    AND (SELECT ST_Distance(e.geometry, c.geometry)
         FROM cras c
         WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
           AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
         ORDER BY e.geometry <-> c.geometry
         LIMIT 1) = (SELECT menor_dist_m FROM min_por_distrito md WHERE md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(md.menor_dist_m AS numeric),2) AS menor_distancia_cras_m,
  COALESCE(cm.qt_escolas_no_min,0) AS qt_escolas_no_minimo
FROM dist d
INNER JOIN min_por_distrito md ON md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
INNER JOIN contagem_no_min cm ON cm.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY menor_distancia_cras_m ASC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Teresina/AM, para cada distrito, qual a soma das menores distâncias entre as escolas que possuem banheiro para Educação Infantil e o CRAS mais próximo localizado no mesmo distrito? Mostre também a quantidade de escolas que possuem sala multiuso e que atingem essa soma de distâncias por distrito.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Teresina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AM'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), min_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    SUM(
      (
        SELECT
          ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, c.geometry)
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
        ORDER BY
          e.geometry <-> c.geometry
        LIMIT 1
      )
    ) AS menor_dist_m
  FROM dist AS d
  INNER JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry) AND COALESCE(meb.in_banheiro_ei, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), contagem_no_min AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_no_min
  FROM dist AS d
  INNER JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_sala_multiuso, 0) = 1
    AND (
      SELECT
        ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, c.geometry)
      FROM cras AS c
      WHERE
        c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, c.geometry)
      ORDER BY
        e.geometry <-> c.geometry
      LIMIT 1
    ) = (
      SELECT
        menor_dist_m
      FROM min_por_distrito AS md
      WHERE
        md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
    )
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(md.menor_dist_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS menor_distancia_cras_m,
  COALESCE(cm.qt_escolas_no_min, 0) AS qt_escolas_no_minimo
FROM dist AS d
INNER JOIN min_por_distrito AS md
  ON md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
INNER JOIN contagem_no_min AS cm
  ON cm.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  menor_distancia_cras_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Natal/RN, qual é, por distrito, a proporção de escolas contidas no distrito que ficam até 1.000 m de alguma biblioteca também contida no mesmo distrito? Informe também a distância média até a biblioteca mais próxima.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Natal' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RN'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
medidas AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS tot_escolas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM biblioteca b
          WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, b.geometry, 1000)
        )
    ) AS tot_ate_1000m,
    AVG(
      (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, b2.geometry))
       FROM biblioteca b2
       WHERE b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b2.geometry))
    ) FILTER (WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist d
  RIGHT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(m.tot_ate_1000m,0) / NULLIF(m.tot_escolas,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_ate_1000m_biblioteca,
  ROUND(CAST(m.dist_media_bib_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_bib_m
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN medidas m ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_ate_1000m_biblioteca DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_bib_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Natal/AP, qual é, por distrito, a proporção de escolas contidas no distrito que ficam até 316 m de alguma biblioteca também presente no mesmo distrito? Informe também a menor distância até a biblioteca mais próxima.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Natal' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AP'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), medidas AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS tot_escolas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(e.geometry, b.geometry, 316)
      )) AS tot_ate_1000m,
    MIN(
      (
        SELECT
          MIN(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, b2.geometry))
        FROM biblioteca AS b2
        WHERE
          b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, b2.geometry)
      )
    ) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist AS d
  RIGHT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(m.tot_ate_1000m, 0) / NULLIF(m.tot_escolas, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_escolas_ate_1000m_biblioteca,
  ROUND(CAST(m.dist_media_bib_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_bib_m
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN medidas AS m
  ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_escolas_ate_1000m_biblioteca DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_bib_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em São Luís/MA, por distrito, qual é a distância média das escolas noturnas até o centróide do distrito e, no mesmo distrito, qual é a distância média das escolas diurnas? Traga também a diferença (noturno − diurno) e ordene da maior diferença para a menor.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'São Luís' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MA'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry) AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_noturno_m,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry) AND COALESCE(meb.in_diurno,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_diurno_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(d.geom_dist, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_noturno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_diurno_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_diurno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m - a.dist_media_diurno_m AS numeric),2) AS diferenca_m
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY diferenca_m DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;

original_question: Em João Pessoa/PB, por distrito, compare: (a) a distância média das escolas com laboratório de informática até o CRAS mais próximo contido no distrito e (b) a distância média dessas escolas até a biblioteca mais próxima contida no distrito. Traga também a razão (a/b).
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'João Pessoa' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PB'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc_lab AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
),
cras_dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(
      (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, c.geometry))
       FROM cras c
       WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, c.geometry))
    ) AS dist_media_cras_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
bib_dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(
      (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry))
       FROM biblioteca b
       WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry))
    ) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, e.geometry)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(c.cd_dist, b.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    c.dist_media_cras_m,
    b.dist_media_bib_m
  FROM cras_dist c
  FULL OUTER JOIN bib_dist b ON b.cd_dist = c.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_cras_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_cras_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_bib_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_bib_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_cras_m / NULLIF(cmp.dist_media_bib_m,0) AS numeric),3) AS razao_cras_por_bib
FROM dist d
FULL OUTER JOIN cmp ON cmp.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY razao_cras_por_bib DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;

original_question: Em Vitória/ES, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas com internet e banda larga que estão dentro do distrito e qual a distância média delas até a borda do próprio distrito?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Vitória' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'ES'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
    ) AS tot_internet_bl,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, ST_Boundary(d.geom_dist))) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_borda_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_internet_bl,0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_borda_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_borda_m
FROM dist d
JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_borda_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Vitória/PA, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas que possuem impressora e equipamento de som dentro do distrito e, entre as escolas que possuem copiadora e lousa digital, qual a maior distância delas até a borda do próprio distrito?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Vitória' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PA'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_equip_impressora, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_equip_som, 0) = 1) AS tot_internet_bl,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, ST_BOUNDARY(d.geom_dist))) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_equip_copiadora, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_equip_lousa_digital, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_borda_m
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(d.geom_dist, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_internet_bl, 0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_borda_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_borda_m
FROM dist AS d
JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_escolas_internet_banda_larga DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_borda_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Maceió/AL, para cada distrito, entre as escolas que estão dentro do distrito e não possuem biblioteca, qual a menor distância até uma biblioteca localizada dentro do mesmo distrito? Mostre também quantas escolas atingem essa menor distância por distrito.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Maceió' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AL'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
min_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    MIN(
      (SELECT ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry)
       FROM biblioteca b
       WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
       ORDER BY e.geometry <-> b.geometry
       LIMIT 1)
    ) AS menor_dist_m
  FROM distritos d
  INNER JOIN escolas e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0)=0
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
contagem_no_min AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_no_min
  FROM distritos d
  INNER JOIN escolas e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca,0)=0
    AND (SELECT ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry)
         FROM biblioteca b
         WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
           AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
         ORDER BY e.geometry <-> b.geometry
         LIMIT 1) = (SELECT menor_dist_m FROM min_por_distrito md WHERE md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(md.menor_dist_m AS numeric),2) AS menor_distancia_biblioteca_m,
  COALESCE(cm.qt_escolas_no_min,0) AS qt_escolas_no_minimo
FROM distritos d
INNER JOIN min_por_distrito md ON md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
INNER JOIN contagem_no_min cm ON cm.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY menor_distancia_biblioteca_m ASC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Maceió/TO, para cada distrito, entre as escolas que estão dentro do distrito e que **não** estão em área de plantio, qual a maior distância mínima até uma biblioteca localizada dentro do mesmo distrito? Mostre também quantas escolas que **não** possuem quadra de esportes atingem essa maior distância mínima por distrito.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Maceió' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'TO'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), min_por_distrito AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    MAX(
      (
        SELECT
          ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, b.geometry)
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        ORDER BY
          e.geometry <-> b.geometry
        LIMIT 1
      )
    ) AS menor_dist_m
  FROM distritos AS d
  INNER JOIN escolas AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_area_plantio, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), contagem_no_min AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_no_min
  FROM distritos AS d
  INNER JOIN escolas AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_quadra_esportes, 0) = 0
    AND (
      SELECT
        ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, b.geometry)
      FROM biblioteca AS b
      WHERE
        b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      ORDER BY
        e.geometry <-> b.geometry
      LIMIT 1
    ) = (
      SELECT
        menor_dist_m
      FROM min_por_distrito AS md
      WHERE
        md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
    )
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(md.menor_dist_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS menor_distancia_biblioteca_m,
  COALESCE(cm.qt_escolas_no_min, 0) AS qt_escolas_no_minimo
FROM distritos AS d
INNER JOIN min_por_distrito AS md
  ON md.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
INNER JOIN contagem_no_min AS cm
  ON cm.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  menor_distancia_biblioteca_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Cuiabá/MT, por distrito, entre as escolas dentro do distrito, qual a distância média até o centróide do distrito para escolas diurnas e para escolas noturnas? Traga também a diferença (noturno − diurno) e ordene da maior diferença para a menor.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Cuiabá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MT'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_diurno,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_diurno_m,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_noturno_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_diurno_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_diurno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_noturno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m - a.dist_media_diurno_m AS numeric),2) AS diferenca_m
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY diferenca_m DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;

  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    SUM(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_fund, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_diurno_m,
    MIN(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_inf_cre, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_noturno_m
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(d.geom_dist, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_diurno_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_diurno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_noturno_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_noturno_m - a.dist_media_diurno_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS diferenca_m
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  diferenca_m DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

original_question: Em Aracaju/SE, por distrito, qual a proporção de escolas dentro do distrito que estão até 800 m de um CRAS dentro do mesmo distrito? Informe também a distância média até o CRAS mais próximo.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Aracaju' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'SE'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
medidas AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, c.geometry, 800)
        )
    ) AS tot_ate_800m,
    AVG(
      (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, c2.geometry))
       FROM cras c2
       WHERE c2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
         AND ST_Within(c2.geometry, d.geom_dist))
    ) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS dist_media_cras_m
  FROM distritos d
  RIGHT JOIN escolas e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(m.tot_ate_800m,0) / NULLIF(m.tot_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_ate_800m_cras,
  ROUND(CAST(m.dist_media_cras_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_cras_m
FROM distritos d
RIGHT JOIN medidas m ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_ate_800m_cras DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_cras_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;

original_question: Em Campo Grande/MS, por distrito, compare a quantidade de bibliotecas dentro do distrito com a quantidade de escolas dentro do distrito que possuem laboratório de informática; traga também a participação percentual de cada distrito no total da diferença no município.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Campo Grande' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MS'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
bib AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_bibliotecas
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
esc_lab AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bibliotecas,0) AS qt_bibliotecas,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_lab,0) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM bib b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
),
fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bibliotecas,
    c.qt_escolas_lab,
    (c.qt_bibliotecas - c.qt_escolas_lab) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN cmp c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bibliotecas,
  qt_escolas_lab,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca) OVER (),0) AS numeric),2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY diferenca DESC, distrito;

original_question: Em Palmas/TO, qual é, por distrito, a área total (em km²) formada pela interseção entre o distrito e as zonas de influência de 300 m ao redor das escolas com internet e banda larga? Traga também o percentual dessa área em relação à área do distrito.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Palmas' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'TO'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Area(d.geometry::geography)/1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT e.cd_mun, ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 300)::geometry AS geom_buf
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1 AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
),
intersec AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_Union(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist d
  JOIN escolas_buf b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/1e6 AS numeric),4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2*1e6,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist d
JOIN intersec i ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY area_intersec_km2 DESC, distrito;

original_question: Em Londrina/PR, por distrito, quantas escolas que funcionam no período noturno ficam a até 800 m de um CRAS quando consideramos apenas a área de interseção entre distrito e um buffer de 100 m do seu contorno? Informe também a distância média dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Londrina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PR'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide,
         ST_Buffer(ST_Boundary(d.geometry)::geography, 100)::geometry AS cinta_100m
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
zona_analise AS (
  SELECT cd_dist, ST_Intersection(geom_dist, cinta_100m) AS geom_zona
  FROM dist
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Intersects(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, c.geometry, 800)
        )
    ) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist d
  RIGHT JOIN zona_analise z ON z.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
  RIGHT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(a.qt_escolas_criterio,0) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_centroide_m
FROM dist d
RIGHT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY qt_escolas_criterio DESC, dist_media_centroide_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Londrina/MT, por distrito, quantas escolas que funcionam no período diurno ficam a até 218 m de um CRAS quando consideramos apenas a área que corresponde à diferença entre o distrito e um buffer de 669 m ao longo do seu contorno? Informe também a distância máxima dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Londrina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MT'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(ST_BOUNDARY(d.geometry) AS GEOGRAPHY), 669) AS GEOMETRY) AS cinta_100m
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), zona_analise AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    ST_DIFFERENCE(geom_dist, cinta_100m) AS geom_zona
  FROM dist
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_diurno, 0) = 1
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_INTERSECTS(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(e.geometry, c.geometry, 218)
      )) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist AS d
  RIGHT JOIN zona_analise AS z
    ON z.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
  RIGHT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(a.qt_escolas_criterio, 0) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
RIGHT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  qt_escolas_criterio DESC,
  dist_media_centroide_m ASC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Uberlândia/MG, por distrito, qual é a escola com maior total de matrículas no fundamental + médio dentre as que estão na interseção entre o distrito e um buffer de 200 m aplicado às próprias escolas; e qual a distância dessa escola até a biblioteca mais próxima contida no mesmo distrito?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Uberlândia' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_mat AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry,
    COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med,0) AS tot_mat,
    ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 200)::geometry AS buf200
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    em.cd_entidade,
    em.tot_mat,
    ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, em.buf200) AS geom_int
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escolas_mat em ON em.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, em.buf200)
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist, cd_entidade, tot_mat,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY tot_mat DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  e.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  r.tot_mat,
  ROUND(CAST(
    (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry))
     FROM biblioteca b
     WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
       AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry))
  AS numeric),2) AS dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m
FROM distritos d
INNER JOIN ranked r ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
INNER JOIN escola e ON e.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY tot_mat DESC, distrito;

original_question: Em Macapá/AP, por distrito, qual a diferença entre: (a) o número de bibliotecas que intersectam o distrito e (b) o número de escolas com laboratório de informática que intersectam o distrito; e qual a participação percentual de cada distrito no total dessa diferença no município?
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Macapá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AP'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
bib AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
esc_lab AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib,0) AS qt_bib,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_lab,0) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM bib b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
),
fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bib,
    c.qt_escolas_lab,
    (c.qt_bib - c.qt_escolas_lab) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN cmp c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bib,
  qt_escolas_lab,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca) OVER (),0) AS numeric),2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY diferenca DESC, distrito;
changed_question: Em Macapá/RJ, por distrito, qual a diferença entre: (a) o número de bibliotecas que intersectam o distrito e (b) o número de escolas que possuem biblioteca e intersectam o distrito; e qual a participação percentual de cada distrito em relação à maior diferença observada entre os distritos do município?
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Macapá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RJ'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN biblioteca AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), esc_lab AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_biblioteca, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib, 0) AS qt_bib,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_lab, 0) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM bib AS b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_lab AS e
    ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
), fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bib,
    c.qt_escolas_lab,
    (
      c.qt_bib - c.qt_escolas_lab
    ) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN cmp AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bib,
  qt_escolas_lab,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(MAX(diferenca) OVER (), 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY
  diferenca DESC,
  distrito

original_question: Em Porto Velho/RO, por distrito, entre as escolas que intersectam o distrito e possuem acessibilidade por rampas, qual é a distância média até o centróide do distrito e qual é a razão entre essa distância média e a distância média das escolas sem rampas? Ordene da maior razão para a menor.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Porto Velho' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RO'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  LEFT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  LEFT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_rampas,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_rampas,0)=0
    ) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(d.geom_dist, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m / NULLIF(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m,0) AS numeric),3) AS razao_rampa_vs_sem
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY razao_rampa_vs_sem DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
changed_question: Em Porto Velho/RN, por distrito, entre as escolas que intersectam o distrito e possuem acessibilidade por vão livre, qual é a distância máxima até o centróide do distrito e qual é a razão entre essa distância máxima e a distância máxima das escolas sem vão livre? Ordene da maior razão para a menor.
changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Porto Velho' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RN'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_vao_livre, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_vao_livre, 0) = 0) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(d.geom_dist, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m / NULLIF(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m, 0) AS DECIMAL), 3) AS razao_rampa_vs_sem
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  razao_rampa_vs_sem DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

original_question: Em Joinville/SC, por distrito, qual é a área (km2) resultante da interseção entre o distrito e a zona de 250 m ao redor das escolas que possuem quadra de esportes? Informe também o percentual dessa área em relação à área do distrito.
original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Joinville' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'SC'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Area(d.geometry::geography)/1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT e.cd_mun,
         ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 250)::geometry AS geom_buf
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_quadra_esportes,0) = 1
),
intersec AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist,
         ST_Union(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist d
  INNER JOIN escolas_buf b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/1e6 AS numeric),4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography) / NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2*1e6,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist d
INNER JOIN intersec i ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY area_intersec_km2 DESC, distrito;
